posts.text:
Yesterday @PatRyanUC and I shared a beautiful day across New York.

We started with produce workers in the Bronx bringing in apples from Ulster County.

Then we went to Kingston and held a town hall in Glens Falls.

Because when working people come together, anything is possible.

Lady, your sloppy resolution would have doxxed victim statements that had identifying info.

It redacted names & NOTHING else. House empl. records can match statements to reverse ID names.

Take your job seriously. Fix your messy loopholes & I’d vote YES. You know that. Not hard!


Nancy Mace (@NancyMace)

🚨FRAUD ALERT🚨
AOC voted against releasing sexual harassment records of Members of Congress. But wants to lecture you on Epstein...





— https://nitter.net/NancyMace/status/2029733214

More details here: 

nitter.net/aoc/status/20294178065…


Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (@AOC)

The idea is good but the text itself was rushed and not thought through. It violated a lot of standard practices to protect survivors and due process:

1. It also released documents related to allegations found to be false or unsubstantiated, not just verified violations or settlements. So innocent people would get lumped in with violators.

2. To our knowledge, there was zero victim consent or consultatio
Town Hall Meeting in Glens Falls with AOC & Pat Ryan

[VIDEO: How we beat authoritarianism. | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez] Thank you. It's funny that you asked this question about Gito because in many ways I relate to him. I share many aspects of his story. I was first elected um when I was uh in in 2018 and I was a waitress in New York City. I had no health insurance. I could not pay my rent. And I consistently saw a party that championed special interests, the elite, um, and a Democratic party that was very much kind of telling working people that everything was fine when it in fact wasn't. And after I was elected, I remember I was crossing this threshold and there's this closed-d dooror meeting of many high-ranking Democratic Party officials, people that you see in the news and all of that. And they uh they derided behind closed doors at that time, a long time ago, they derided many of the populist demands
History teachers: know how important you are in this moment. | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

[VIDEO: People will not forget this. | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez] In my view, one's opinion on concealed carry is irrelevant to the laws of this land in terms of the facts of what exists right now. When you speak about cognitive dissonance, this is the intention of what Secretary Gnome is discussing. How rich is it that she is saying showing up to the scene of a protest with a legallyowned weapon should be grounds for a person's death, execution at the hands of the state by the same party and the same administration that praises Kyle Writtenhouse when she is talking about how merely showing up and inciting violence based on ideology against the government when this administration has pardoned in hundreds of January 6 riers who have then gone out into the streets and recommitted crimes of violence over and over again. What Secretary Gnome is saying is not

[VIDEO: They want us divided. It will not work. | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez] If you can keep the American electorate deeply divided, then you can continue to loot the economy, enrich yourself, you can continue to pass corrupt laws. It's no coincidence here that this explosion in ICE funding is also a complete giveaway to the surveillance tech companies like Palunteer and many others that seek to create billion dollar contracts and enrich themselves off of a surveillance state that attacks the American people more broadly. If you can keep the American people divided, then they can continue on their program and their agenda of funneling billions of dollars and corruption, whether it's offshore accounts, whether it's these crypto coins, whether it's jacking up tariffs and costs on the American people so that the billionaires that funded this administration and Donald

[VIDEO: Do not let this administration intimidate you. | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez] Well, Jake, as you mentioned, that's just one of several videos that are out there. There's a second angle that appears to be circulating much closer to the incident where you see the victim, I believe his name is Alex Prey, and immediately preceding that incident, an ICE officer had pushed violently a woman to the ground and he had come over to help get her up. And that is what precipitated this incident that very quickly led to an execution, a deadly shooting in the street. What we are seeing here is a momentous pivotal moment for the United States. And I cannot underscore enough how precipitous this moment is. ICE and CBP. What we're seeing here, we will see uh which agencies were responsible. But at the end of the day, under this so-called excuse of border security, where Minneapolis i
A Fight for Every New Yorker. | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
They Gut Your Healthcare to Pay for ICE Thugs to Shoot Moms in the Street | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
AOC at the Inauguration of Zohran Mamdani. | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

[VIDEO: "Affordability is con"? Really? | Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez] I wonder what grade you would give [music] >> A+. >> What grade would you give the economy right now? >> Oh, I would give it a D. >> A+. >> Yeah. A++ plus. >> I think he's very out [music] of touch. >> We have record high levels of young people that are unemployed. >> And I have not been able to find work since I left the military in 2022. [music] >> Being paid very low wages and can't afford life. Katya's rent for this 300 ft apartment is going to jump from $670 a month to just over $1,000. She says her paycheck won't cover it. >> I would consider living in my car. [music] >> 46% of Americans say the cost of living in the US is the worst they can ever remember. >> 37% of people who voted for Trump [music] in 2024 share that view. >> I had to find a pantry because, you know, food is coming

Change isn’t up to the cynics. It’s up to us.
NEW YORK: it’s time to VOTE in the June 25th primaries. This is where we can make the BIGGEST differences in our politics.
.
This is where we decide not just about voting for Dems or Republicans, but WHO and WHICH Dems win. This is the month to support those candidates who have risked it all, from New York to St. Louis, for courageous stances against all odds, from the human rights of Palestinians to Medicare for All. So VOTE for a ceasefire. VOTE fo

A lot of people talk about reconnecting with voters. 
This is what it actually looks like:

100+ Swing Left volunteers, @aoc, and @patryanforcongress joined a Ground Truth canvass yesterday—knocking every door and listening to what people are actually experiencing in their lives.

This is where rebuilding trust starts.

Elise Stefanik hasn’t held an in-person town hall in 6 years. 

So my friend @aoc and I decided to hop in the car to Glens Falls and hold one ourselves. 

Showing up everywhere. Listening to everyone. Fighting for our future. 

That’s what democracy looks like.
AOC and I have a bill to make child care affordable for every family.

Learning a second language can be hard. Signing up for Pre-K and 3-K is easy.

Go to myschools.nyc to apply today. Deadline is tomorrow at midnight!

Mi español es… no muy bueno. Pero la lucha para cuidado infantil universal? Eso es muy bueno.

Asi que traje una amiga para ayudarme a compartirles porque registrarse para el kinder-3 y prekinder esta semana importa. Vamos a registrarlos.

Visite myschools.nyc para empezar.

——

My Spanish is… no bueno. But the fight for universal childcare? Muy bueno.
 
So I brought a friend to help me share why signing up for free 3-K and Pre-K this week matters. Let’s get you enrolled. 

Visit myschools.nyc t

Demokratische Kräfte müssen zusammenhalten - und das auch über Grenzen hinweg! Internationale Solidarität und Zusammenarbeit sind aktuell besonders wichtig. Denn in Zeiten erstarkender autokratischer Bestrebungen weltweit müssen wir uns gut vernetzen und voneinander lernen.
Dafür steht auch die US-Kongressabgeordnete der Demokraten Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Am Sonntag hat sie uns im Bundestag besucht. Organisiert wurde das Treffen von @isacademartori . @aoc hat sich mit einigen Abgeordneten der

It is of utmost urgency that we get our economic houses in order and deliver material gains for the working class — or else we will fall to a more isolated world, governed by authoritarians that also do not deliver for working people.
Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) linked income inequality to the rise in authoritarianism in Munich.

"We do not pledge allegiance to Wall Street. We don't pledge allegiance to greed. We pledge allegiance to no one president. We pledge allegiance to a nation. Our nation. The United States of America. To the betterment of all people." - Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
#UAWCAP2026

REP. @aoc : “Why haven’t so many people been prosecuted? Why are Pam Bondi & DOJ hiding the majority of the Epstein files? We need to get to the bottom of it. It doesn’t matter if you’re Republican, Dem… We’re talking about sexual crimes and trafficking.”

(From @pabloreports )

Trump ran on a campaign promise to the American people that ICE would go after the “worst of the worst.”

The reality is that of the more than 73,000+ people in ICE detention right now, 92% of those people have ZERO criminal record. This administration is using ICE as much more of an anti-civilian force meant for political persecution of this president’s perceived enemies.
